steps.title: Find two points on the line of best fit
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit passes through approximately $(24,10)$ on the left and reaches roughly $(34,0)$ on the right.

steps.title: Evaluate at x = 32
steps.content:
$$y=10-(32-24)=10-8=2.$$ Among the answer choices, $2$ is closest to $2.4$.
  • $0.4$: corresponds to roughly $x\approx 33.6$ on the line — too low.
  • $1.5$: corresponds to roughly $x\approx 32.5$ — close but farther from $2$ than $2.4$ is.
  • $2.4$: closest to the predicted value of $2$ at $x=32$ — matches.
  • $3.3$: would require $x\approx 30.7$ — too high.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
